heading: Slow Queries
body:
To optimize your query performance, [review the best practices for query performance](query-best-practices). You can also
[analyze slow queries](analyze-slow-queries) and troubleshoot
slow operations executed on your clusters.

Use the following built-in tools:

- [Performance Advisor](performance-advisor) with
  the Performance Advisor.

- [monitor collection-level query latency](namespace-insights)
  with Namespace Insights.

- [Query Profiler](profile-database) with the Query
  Profiler.

- [Real-Time Performance Panel](real-time-metrics-status-tab)
  with the Real-Time Performance Panel.
